message:
chore: Clean up agent-booster folder structure

- Move 10 old documentation files to docs/ directory
- Move 6 old benchmark docs to benchmarks/archive/
- Remove temporary files (STATUS.txt, comparison-template.md)
- Remove build artifacts (pkg/, target/, .claude-flow/)
- Keep only active documentation in root:
  - README.md
  - FINAL_COMPARISON_REPORT.md
  - MORPH_COMPATIBILITY.md
  - MULTILANGUAGE_SUPPORT.md
  - OPTIMIZATION_STRATEGY.md

files.patch:
@@ -1,183 +0,0 @@
-================================================================================
-AGENT BOOSTER BENCHMARK STATUS
-================================================================================
-
-Date: October 7, 2025
-Mission: Run performance benchmarks against Morph LLM
-
-================================================================================
-COMPLETED TASKS
-================================================================================
-
-✅ 1. Created Small Test Dataset (12 samples)
-   Location: /workspaces/agentic-flow/agent-booster/benchmarks/datasets/small-test-dataset.json
-   Contents: 12 JavaScript/TypeScript transformation tasks
-   Categories: TypeScript, Error Handling, Modernization, Async, Validation
-
-✅ 2. Morph LLM Baseline Benchmark
-   Script: /workspaces/agentic-flow/agent-booster/benchmarks/morph-benchmark.js
-   Status: Successfully completed
-   Results: 12/12 tests passed (100% success rate)
-   Model: morph-v3-fast
-   API: https://api.morphllm.com/v1/chat/completions
-
-✅ 3. Results Analysis
-   Script: /workspaces/agentic-flow/agent-booster/benchmarks/analyze-results.js
-   Output: Comprehensive performance and cost analysis
-
-✅ 4. Documentation
-   - RESULTS.md: Detailed benchmark report with tables
-   - SUMMARY.md: Executive summary with key findings
-   - comparison-template.md: Template for Agent Booster comparison
-   - README.md: Benchmark directory documentation
-   - STATUS.txt: This status file
-
-✅ 5. Memory Storage
-   Namespace: agent-booster-swarm
-   Keys stored:
-   - morphllm-usage: Current API usage tracking
-   - benchmark-progress: Benchmark status and next steps
-
-================================================================================
-MORPH LLM RESULTS
-================================================================================
-
-Performance:
-- Average Latency: 352ms
-- Success Rate: 100% (12/12)
-- Total Time: 16.2 seconds
-- Fastest: 252ms (error handling)
-- Slowest: 541ms (documentation)
-
-Resource Usage:
-- Applies: 12/500 (2.4%)
-- Input Tokens: 963/300,000 (0.32%)
-- Output Tokens: 427/100,000 (0.43%)
-- Remaining: 488 applies, 299K input, 99.5K output
-
-Key Insights:
-- Network latency: ~200ms overhead
-- API processing: ~152ms
-- Bottleneck: 500 applies/month limit
-- Token-efficient: 116 tokens avg per test
-
-================================================================================
-AGENT BOOSTER OPPORTUNITY
-================================================================================
-
-Projected Performance:
-- Estimated Latency: 76ms (4.6x faster than Morph)
-- Latency Reduction: 276ms saved per test
-- Network Overhead: Eliminated (200ms savings)
-
-Cost Benefits:
-- Monthly Capacity: Unlimited vs 500 applies
-- Marginal Cost: $0 vs API calls
-- Privacy: Code stays local
-- Offline: Works without internet
-
-================================================================================
-PENDING TASKS
-================================================================================
-
-⏳ 1. Wait for npm-progress Completion
-   Status: Awaiting Agent Booster package installation
-   Required: Agent Booster must be installed to run local benchmarks
-
-⏳ 2. Agent Booster Benchmark
-   Plan: Run same 12 tests using Agent Booster
-   Metrics: Measure latency, accuracy, memory usage
-   Script: TBD (create after installation)
-
-⏳ 3. Comparison Report
-   Plan: Generate side-by-side comparison
-   Format: Tables, charts, speedup ratios
-   Output: Final COMPARISON.md report
-
-⏳ 4. Visualization
-   Plan: Create performance graphs
-   Tools: Consider using chart libraries or ASCII charts
-   Metrics: Latency comparison, category breakdown
-
-================================================================================
-USAGE TRACKING (CRITICAL)
-================================================================================
-
-FREE PLAN LIMITS:
-- Applies: 500/month
-- Input Tokens: 300K/month
-- Output Tokens: 100K/month
-
-CURRENT USAGE:
-- Applies: 12 used (2.4%)
-- Input: 963 tokens (0.32%)
-- Output: 427 tokens (0.43%)
-
-REMAINING BUDGET:
-- Applies: 488 (97.6%)
-- Input: 299,037 tokens (99.7%)
-- Output: 99,573 tokens (99.6%)
-
-SAFETY MARGIN:
-✅ Well within limits
-✅ Can run ~40 more similar benchmarks
-✅ Projected depletion: 48 days (at 10 tests/day)
-
-================================================================================
-FILES CREATED
-================================================================================
-
-1. /workspaces/agentic-flow/agent-booster/benchmarks/datasets/small-test-dataset.json
-2. /workspaces/agentic-flow/agent-booster/benchmarks/morph-benchmark.js
-3. /workspaces/agentic-flow/agent-booster/benchmarks/analyze-results.js
-4. /workspaces/agentic-flow/agent-booster/benchmarks/results/morph-baseline-results.json
-5. /workspaces/agentic-flow/agent-booster/benchmarks/RESULTS.md
-6. /workspaces/agentic-flow/agent-booster/benchmarks/SUMMARY.md
-7. /workspaces/agentic-flow/agent-booster/benchmarks/comparison-template.md
-8. /workspaces/agentic-flow/agent-booster/benchmarks/README.md
-9. /workspaces/agentic-flow/agent-booster/benchmarks/STATUS.txt
-
-================================================================================
-NEXT STEPS
-================================================================================
-
-1. Monitor npm-progress completion
-2. Install Agent Booster when ready
-3. Create agent-booster-benchmark.js script
-4. Run identical 12-test suite locally
-5. Compare results and calculate speedup
-6. Generate final comparison report with recommendations
-
-================================================================================
-MEMORY COMMANDS
-================================================================================
-
-Retrieve usage tracking:
-npx claude-flow@alpha memory retrieve --namespace agent-booster-swarm --key morphllm-usage
-
-Retrieve benchmark progress:
-npx claude-flow@alpha memory retrieve --namespace agent-booster-swarm --key benchmark-progress
-
-Update progress:
-npx claude-flow@alpha memory store --namespace agent-booster-swarm --key benchmark-progress --value "{...}"
-
-================================================================================
-API CREDENTIALS
-================================================================================
-
-API Key: sk-ifrAh8auI9Gkk2J_Sw9pCR0EGA81zIS5ZqouMesp_AzHKA-M
-Endpoint: https://api.morphllm.com/v1/chat/completions
-Model: morph-v3-fast
-
-================================================================================
-CONCLUSION
-================================================================================
-
-✅ Mission Phase 1 COMPLETE: Morph LLM baseline established
-⏳ Mission Phase 2 PENDING: Agent Booster benchmark (awaiting npm-progress)
-📊 Results: 100% success rate, 352ms avg latency, 12 applies used
-🎯 Target: Achieve 4.6x speedup with Agent Booster local processing
-
-Status: READY FOR PHASE 2 - Awaiting Agent Booster installation
-
-================================================================================

@@ -1,178 +0,0 @@
-# Agent Booster vs Morph LLM Comparison
-
-**Status:** Awaiting Agent Booster benchmark results
-
----
-
-## Performance Comparison
-
-| Metric | Morph LLM | Agent Booster | Improvement |
-|--------|-----------|---------------|-------------|
-| Average Latency | 352ms | TBD | TBD |
-| Success Rate | 100% (12/12) | TBD | TBD |
-| Total Time (12 tests) | 16.2s | TBD | TBD |
-| Fastest Test | 252ms | TBD | TBD |
-| Slowest Test | 541ms | TBD | TBD |
-
----
-
-## Cost Comparison
-
-| Aspect | Morph LLM | Agent Booster | Winner |
-|--------|-----------|---------------|--------|
-| Monthly Limit | 500 applies | Unlimited | 🏆 Agent Booster |
-| Marginal Cost | API calls | Zero | 🏆 Agent Booster |
-| Setup Cost | None | npm install | 🏆 Morph LLM |
-| Scaling Cost | Paid plan required | Free | 🏆 Agent Booster |
-
----
-
-## Feature Comparison
-
-| Feature | Morph LLM | Agent Booster | Notes |
-|---------|-----------|---------------|-------|
-| Internet Required | Yes | No | Agent Booster works offline |
-| Privacy | Code sent to API | Code stays local | Agent Booster more private |
-| Setup | API key only | npm install | Morph LLM easier setup |
-| Customization | Fixed models | Extensible patterns | Agent Booster more flexible |
-| Complex Tasks | Excellent | TBD | Morph may handle novel cases better |
-| Simple Tasks | Good | TBD | Agent Booster likely faster |
-
----
-
-## Category-Specific Performance
-
-### Error Handling (2 tests)
-| Metric | Morph LLM | Agent Booster | Improvement |
-|--------|-----------|---------------|-------------|
-| Avg Latency | 292ms | TBD | TBD |
-| Avg Tokens | 99 | N/A (local) | 100% token savings |
-
-### Modernization (3 tests)
-| Metric | Morph LLM | Agent Booster | Improvement |
-|--------|-----------|---------------|-------------|
-| Avg Latency | 299ms | TBD | TBD |
-| Avg Tokens | 125 | N/A (local) | 100% token savings |
-
-### TypeScript Conversion (2 tests)
-| Metric | Morph LLM | Agent Booster | Improvement |
-|--------|-----------|---------------|-------------|
-| Avg Latency | 368ms | TBD | TBD |
-| Avg Tokens | 104 | N/A (local) | 100% token savings |
-
-### Async Conversion (2 tests)
-| Metric | Morph LLM | Agent Booster | Improvement |
-|--------|-----------|---------------|-------------|
-| Avg Latency | 386ms | TBD | TBD |
-| Avg Tokens | 144 | N/A (local) | 100% token savings |
-
----
-
-## Expected Performance Gains (Projections)
-
-### Latency Breakdown
-```
-Morph LLM Total: 352ms
-├─ Network: 200ms
-└─ Processing: 152ms
-
-Agent Booster Total: ~76ms (projected)
-├─ Pattern Match: 30ms
-└─ Transform: 46ms
-
-Speedup: 4.6x faster
-```
-
-### Monthly Capacity
-```
-Morph LLM: 500 tests/month (limited by applies)
-Agent Booster: Unlimited tests/month
-
-Capacity Increase: Infinite
-```
-
----
-
-## Use Case Recommendations
-
-### When to Use Morph LLM
-1. Complex, novel transformations requiring deep understanding
-2. Multi-file refactoring with context dependencies
-3. One-off transformations without setup time
-4. Documentation generation tasks
-5. When internet is available and latency is acceptable
-
-### When to Use Agent Booster
-1. Repetitive code transformations
-2. Batch processing of similar tasks
-3. High-volume workflows (>500 tests/month)
-4. Offline development environments
-5. Privacy-sensitive codebases
-6. Cost-sensitive projects
-7. Speed-critical applications
-
----
-
-## ROI Analysis
-
-### Break-Even Point
-```
-Morph LLM Free Plan: 500 applies/month
-Agent Booster Setup: One-time npm install
-
-Break-even: After 500 tests
-Monthly Savings (at 10 tests/day): Unlimited capacity vs 500 cap
-Time Savings: 276ms × 500 tests = 138 seconds/month
-```
-
-### Annual Projections
-```
-Morph LLM:
-- Tests/year: 6,000 (500/month × 12)
-- Cost: Free tier limit
-
-Agent Booster:
-- Tests/year: Unlimited
-- Cost: $0 marginal cost
-- Time Saved: 27 minutes/month (at 500 tests)
-```
-
----
-
-## Conclusion
-
-### Strengths Summary
-
-**Morph LLM:**
-- Zero setup required
-- Excellent for complex tasks
-- Consistent quality
-- No local dependencies
-
-**Agent Booster:**
-- 4.6x faster (projected)
-- Unlimited usage
-- Zero marginal cost
-- Offline capability
-- Enhanced privacy
-
-### Recommended Strategy
-
-**Hybrid Approach:**
-1. Use Agent Booster for repetitive, pattern-based transformations
-2. Fall back to Morph LLM for complex, novel cases
-3. Cache Morph LLM results as Agent Booster patterns for future use
-4. Maximize free tier while building local optimization library
-
----
-
-**Next Steps:**
-1. Complete Agent Booster benchmark
-2. Update this comparison with actual results
-3. Generate visualization charts
-4. Publish final report
-
-**Files:**
-- Morph Results: `/workspaces/agentic-flow/agent-booster/benchmarks/results/morph-baseline-results.json`
-- Agent Booster Results: TBD
-- Test Dataset: `/workspaces/agentic-flow/agent-booster/benchmarks/datasets/small-test-dataset.json`
